info.name: PMO Dashboard — Phase IF Smoke Test (Post IE Fixes)
info.description:
Updated smoke test collection after Phase IE deployment.

CHANGES FROM IA-3 VERSION:
✅ 03-A2: Renamed query param type= → operation_type= (Phase IE DTO fix)
✅ 08-E: UNBLOCKED — submit now works (Phase IE fixed 'role' column drift)
✅ 08-F: UNBLOCKED — approve works after successful submit
✅ IF-V gate assertions added to 08-E, 08-F, 08-G

EXECUTION ORDER (STRICT — variables chain across requests):
  00-A → 01-A → 02-A → 03-A → 03-B → 03-C → 04-A → 04-B → 04-C
  → 05-A → 06-A → 06-B → 06-C → 06-D → 06-E → 07-A → 07-B → 07-C
  → 07-D → 08-A → 08-B → 08-C → 08-D → 08-E → 08-F → 08-G
  → 09-A → 09-B → 09-C → 09-D → 10-A..10-I → 11-1..11-6 → 12-1..12-6
  → CLEANUP

CRITICAL: Run 03-B before any /:id/ endpoint (sets {{op_id}}).
CRITICAL: Run 06-A before 06-D (sets {{tax_id}}).
CRITICAL: Run 08-A before 08-E (sets {{qr_id}}).
CRITICAL: 08-E must succeed (PENDING_REVIEW) before 08-F (approve).

GATE CRITERIA:
  IF-V1: 08-E returns 200 + publication_status = PENDING_REVIEW
  IF-V2: 08-F returns 200 + publication_status = PUBLISHED
  IF-V3: 06-A returns 200 with valid {{op_id}} in URL
  IF-V4: IA-V7–IA-V12 (no this.db.query / DatabaseModule regressions)
  IF-V5: IE-V1–IE-V5 (operation_type= filter works; no 'role' column 500)

Section 13: Phase IJ — Assignment CRUD endpoints (IJ-V1 through IJ-V5). Requires {{staff_user_id}} collection variable to be set to a valid Staff user UUID.

variable.description: Taxonomy item UUID — auto-set by 06-A (first item id)
Staff user UUID — operator-supplied for Phase IJ Section 13 assignment tests

request.description: Login to get Bearer token. Token is auto-set to {{token}} collection variable.
Uses FY 2027 to avoid conflicts with existing data.
Toggle the smoke-test FY back off so it doesn't pollute selectors.
Guard test: invalid pillar returns empty array, NOT 500.

item.name: 03-A2: List Operations with operation_type Filter ✅ (Phase IE — IE-V1 gate)

exec: pm.test('[IE-V1] Status 200 with operation_type= filter', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
console.error('❌ 400 error — Phase IE DTO fix may not be deployed:', JSON.stringify(body));

request.description:
✅ PHASE IE FIX: DTO field renamed from 'type' to 'operation_type'. This was 400 before IE.

IE-V1 gate: must return 200 (not 400 'property type should not exist').
IE-V2 gate (separate): sending ?type= now returns 400 — run that manually if needed.

exec: console.log('✅ op_id set to:', json.id, '— all /:id/ endpoints will use this.');

body.raw:
{
  "operation_type": "HIGHER_EDUCATION",
  "title": "IF Smoke Test — HIGHER EDUCATION FY2025",
  "description": "Smoke test operation for Phase IF verification",
  "code": "HE-IF-2025",
  "start_date": "2025-01-01",
  "end_date": "2025-12-31",
  "status": "ONGOING",
  "campus": "MAIN",
  "fiscal_year": 2025
}

request.description:
Creates test operation. ID auto-set to {{op_id}}.

MUST run before: 04-A, 04-B, 06-A, 06-C, 06-D, 07-A, 07-B, 08-A, 12-3
Physical/Financial page entry point. 404 acceptable if no operation exists for this pillar+year.

item.name: 06-A: Get Indicator Taxonomy for Operation ⭐ (IF-V3 gate — sets {{tax_id}})

exec: console.error('❌ PRE-REQUEST: {{op_id}} is not set. Run 03-B first.');
throw new Error('op_id not set — run 03-B before 06-A');
pm.test('[IF-V3] Status 200 (valid op_id in URL)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
console.log('✅ IF-V3 PASS: indicator-taxonomy returned 200 with valid op_id.');
console.error('❌ Taxonomy empty. Ensure operation has a valid operation_type matching a seeded pillar.');

request.description:
IF-V3 gate: must return 200 (was 404 when {{op_id}} was empty in IA-3 smoke run).

Pre-request guard aborts if {{op_id}} is unset, preventing the empty-URL 404.

First taxonomy item id auto-saved to {{tax_id}} for 06-D.

item.name: 06-B: Get Indicators by Pillar + Year + Quarter

exec: console.error('❌ PRE-REQUEST: {{tax_id}} not set. Run 06-A first.');
throw new Error('tax_id not set — run 06-A before 06-D');

request.description: Creates financial record. Verify computed metrics: utilization_rate ≈ 84, disbursement_rate ≈ 92.86.
Should return the record created in 07-B.

exec: console.log('✅ qr_id set to:', json.id, '— 08-E and 08-F will use this.');

request.description: Uses Q2 to avoid conflict with Q1 records from prior smoke runs. ORM path: em.create(QuarterlyReport).

item.name: 08-B: Create Same QR Again → idempotent (same id)
08-E: Submit Quarterly Report ✅ (IF-V1 gate — Phase IE fix)

exec: console.error('❌ PRE-REQUEST: {{qr_id}} not set. Run 08-A first.');
throw new Error('qr_id not set — run 08-A before 08-E');
pm.test('[IF-V1] Status 200 — no 500 role column error', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
console.log('✅ IF-V1 PASS: submit returned 200, status = PENDING_REVIEW. Phase IE role fix confirmed.');
console.error('Phase IE (permissionResolver.isAdminFromDatabase) may not be deployed.');

request.description:
✅ UNBLOCKED — Phase IE deployed.

IF-V1 gate: must return 200 + publication_status = PENDING_REVIEW.

Fix applied (Phase IE): submitQuarterlyReport() now calls
  this.permissionResolver.isAdminFromDatabase(userId)
instead of the broken 'SELECT role FROM users WHERE id=$1'.

08-F (approve) depends on this returning PENDING_REVIEW.

exec: console.error('❌ PRE-REQUEST: {{qr_id}} not set. Run 08-A first.');
throw new Error('qr_id not set — run 08-A before 08-F');
console.log('✅ IF-V2 PASS: approve returned 200, status = PUBLISHED. Full workflow lifecycle confirmed.');
console.error('❌ IF-V2 FAIL: QR still in DRAFT. 08-E (submit) must have failed. Check IF-V1 first.');

request.description:
✅ UNBLOCKED — depends on 08-E succeeding (PENDING_REVIEW state).

IF-V2 gate: must return 200 + publication_status = PUBLISHED.

If this returns 400 'Only PENDING_REVIEW reports can be approved', it means 08-E failed — resolve IF-V1 first.
Verifies submission audit trail. Expects SUBMITTED (from 08-E) + APPROVED (from 08-F) events.

item.name: 11 — REGRESSION: Physical Page Flow (IA-V12)

item.name: 13 — Assignments (IJ)
item.description: Phase IJ — Assignment CRUD endpoints (IJ-V1 through IJ-V5). Requires {{staff_user_id}} collection variable set to a valid Staff user UUID.

exec: pm.test('13-A: GET assignments returns 200 with array', function () {
pm.test('13-B: POST assignment returns 201 with assignment object', function () {
pm.test('13-C: Repeat POST returns existing assignment (idempotent — no duplicate)', function () {
pm.test('13-D: DELETE assignment returns 204 No Content', function () {
console.log('✅ Cleanup complete. Test operation soft-deleted.');

request.description: Soft-deletes the test operation created in 03-B. Does not affect existing FY2025 production data.
